title: crotalaria polyantha
intro: Crotalaria polyantha, also known as the Butterfly Flower or Crotalaria, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, characterized by its vibrant yellow or orange flowers and clusters of long, pointed leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including intestinal worms and skin conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria polyantha include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although caution should be exercised due to potential toxicity and side effects.
